name: RHEL edge firewalld router repair
prompt: You are working in a benchmark fixture. Repair the checked-in firewalld router policy so it matches the local RHEL edge-router contract: WAN stays on the external zone, LAN services stay internal, masquerading happens only toward the internet, and HTTP/HTTPS are forwarded to the ingress VIP. Keep the existing firewalld-based approach, make the smallest correct changes, and do not add unrelated files. Success means the verifier script passes.
